query:
SELECT 
  e.id,
  e.corretorId,
  u.name as corretor_nome,
  e.data,
  e.aceitouFollowUp,
  e.createdAt
FROM escolha_diaria_follow_up e
LEFT JOIN users u ON e.corretorId = u.id
ORDER BY e.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
